label: Basic Range: value within bounds
description: Asserts that a function's return value always stays within [min, max] for any input in that range. The canonical prop_assert! range check.

label: Contract State: balance never drops below zero
description: Verifies that no sequence of withdraw calls can make a token balance go negative. Tests the core safety invariant of any token or escrow contract.

label: Shrinking Demo: deliberate failure to show minimisation
description: A test that is designed to fail so you can observe proptest's shrinking process in the ProptestView pane. The assertion fails whenever the value exceeds 100, and proptest will shrink the counter-example down to 101.
